payload.compiled_summary: SuperLU: review Probe SuperLU through artifact://environment-spec/eng_sparse_direct_family_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for SuperLU. Checklist SuperLU pack links to the intended environment spec(s), SuperLU adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, SuperLU anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using SuperLU for using superlu as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside solver-backend workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_sparse_direct_family_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for SuperLU without a typed contract tied to superlu backend kernels reused by solver-backend workflows..
